children.text: Moved the variant annotation tool to /annotate and made a chat assistant the landing page
Switched to credible-set-only data served by the new genetics-results-api; results are no longer p-value-filtered associations
Replaced the p-value threshold with PIP and cs_min_r2 filters, and moved resource and data-type selection into the main options (derived dynamically from the data)
Added colocalization for each credible set in the expanded variant view
Added a phenotype-search view showing full summary statistics for all input variants for a chosen phenotype, with credible-set membership flags
Added a Gene evidence tab (gene burden, gene expression, Mendelian gene-disease) to the gene view
Added caQTL results and an eQTL/caQTL toggle in the tissue and cell type summary
Added optional eQTL Catalogue quantification levels (exon, transcript, txrev, leafcutter) alongside the default gene level
Added a gene view that shows credible sets in and around genes, as well as genes that affect or are affected by the input gene by pQTLs
Added datasets: FinnGen/MVP/UKBB meta-analysis, FinnGen Kanta lab values, FinnGen pQTLs
Updated datasets: Open Targets, eQTL Catalogue, FinnGen, FinnGen/UKBB meta-analysis
Added a QTL tissue and cell type summary table in the variant view
Added a download option to the phenotype summary table in the variant view
Added a gene-based search in the variant view that returns results for coding variants in the gene
